subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Thou beholdest my low estate and the habitation wherein I dwell
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری مقری و مقامی و تشهد اضطرابی و اضطراری و ضری و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
